login.title: Sign in to your hosting panel
login.subtitle: Manage your domains, files, email and security from one place.
login.invalidCredentials: Invalid username or PIN. Please try again.
login.forgotPinHint: Open the bot, go to My Hosting Plans, and tap "Show Credentials" to regenerate.
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in

domains.title: Your Domains
domains.noDomains: No domains yet. Add your first addon domain above.
domains.deleteConfirm: Permanently remove {{domain}}? Files in its document root will be left untouched.

files.title: File Manager
files.deleteConfirm: Delete {{count}} item(s)? This cannot be undone.

getStarted.title: Get your website online
getStarted.subtitle: You're in the right place! Upload your website files here and they'll be live at {{url}}
getStarted.step1Body: Click "Upload" or drag & drop your website files (HTML, CSS, JS, images) into this area. For a full site, upload a .zip file and click "Extract".
getStarted.step2Body: Your main page should be named index.html (or index.php). This is what visitors see when they open your domain.
getStarted.step3Body: Once files are uploaded, your site is live at {{url}}
getStarted.proTip: Pro tip: Zip your entire website folder, upload the .zip, then click "Extract" — much faster than uploading files one by one!

fm.bulkTip: Tip: Upload a .zip of your website and click "Extract" to unpack all files at once. Your site goes live at {{url}}
fm.emptyUploadHint: Upload your website files here to get started
fm.searchTryAgain: Try a different search term, or press Esc to clear.

drag.dropHere: Drop files or folders here to upload
drag.hintPublic: Folder structure is preserved · Files go live on your website
drag.hintOther: Folder structure is preserved · Subdirectories will be created automatically

copymove.hint: Enter the full path where you want to {{action}} the file.

delete.folderWarning: Some items are folders — their contents will be permanently deleted.
delete.singleFolderWarning: This will permanently delete the folder and everything inside it.

bulkMove.title: Move {{count}} items to…
bulkMove.hint: Enter the full path where you want to move the selected items.

em.title: Email Accounts
em.bulkDeleteWarning: All mail in these inboxes will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
em.emptyNoAccounts: No email accounts yet. Create one to get started.

sec.title: Security

htaccessCloaking.label: .htaccess IP Cloaking
htaccessCloaking.desc: Blocks 35+ known scanner IP ranges at server level

cfWafRules.label: Cloudflare WAF Rules
cfWafRules.desc: WAF rules blocking malicious crawlers at the edge

jsChallenge.label: Visitor Captcha (JS Challenge)
jsChallenge.desc: Per-domain bot challenge — Golden plan only. Manage per-domain in the Domains tab.

sec.captchaGoldOnlyError: Visitor Captcha is exclusive to Golden Anti-Red HostPanel plans. Upgrade your plan to enable it.
sec.captchaDisableWarning:
Warning: Disabling Visitor Captcha significantly reduces your protection against automated scanners and bots. We strongly recommend keeping it enabled for maximum security.

Are you sure you want to disable it?
sec.captchaDefaultGoldError: Visitor Captcha is exclusive to Golden Anti-Red HostPanel plans.
sec.goldOnlyTooltip: Visitor Captcha is exclusive to Golden Anti-Red HostPanel plans. Your plan: {{plan}}

dl.title: Domains
dl.runAutoSSLTitle: Issue/renew SSL certificates for all domains
dl.addNote: The domain will be linked to its own directory under public_html/{domain}. Upload your website files there after adding.
dl.upgradeCaptchaBody: Block scanners, scrapers and bots at the Cloudflare edge with a per-domain "Verifying your browser" challenge. Available exclusively on Golden Anti-Red HostPanel — ${{price}}/mo.
dl.captchaGoldTooltip: Visitor Captcha is exclusive to Golden Anti-Red HostPanel (${{price}}/mo). Your plan: {{plan}}
dl.captchaOnTooltip: Visitor Captcha is ON — click to disable
dl.captchaOffTooltip: Visitor Captcha is OFF — click to enable
dl.captchaNotCloudflare: {{domain}} is not on Cloudflare. Visitor Captcha requires Cloudflare nameservers.
dl.captchaDisableConfirm:
Disable Visitor Captcha for {{domain}}?

Visitors will no longer see the "Verifying your browser" check. Bots and scanners will not be blocked at the edge.
dl.pointNameserversTo: Point your domain to these Cloudflare nameservers:
dl.pendingNote: Status will show as "Pending" until NS propagation completes (up to 24-48h).
dl.addSubdomainNote: Subdomain will be linked to public_html/{subdomain} directory.
dl.nsAutoConfigured: Nameservers configured automatically. Propagation in progress...
dl.nsAutoNote: This usually completes within a few minutes.
dl.nsExternalUpdate: Update your nameservers at your domain registrar:
dl.nsExternalNote: Propagation can take up to 24-48 hours.
dl.nsExternalNoteTail: (also triggers SSL issuance if NS active)

an.title: Visitor Analytics
an.emptyNoData: No analytics data available. Ensure your domain is active on Cloudflare.

geo.title: Geo Settings
geo.modeBlockDesc: Visitors from selected countries will be BLOCKED from your website.
geo.modeAllowDesc: ONLY visitors from selected countries can access your website. All others will be blocked.
geo.emptyNone: No geo rules configured. All countries can access your website.

acct.cancelDoneBody1: Your hosting for {{domain}} has been terminated. The cPanel account, files, email accounts, databases, and all addon domains have been removed.
acct.cancelDoneBody2: Your domain itself stays registered to your account — it's just no longer attached to a hosting plan. You can purchase a new hosting plan anytime from the Telegram bot.
acct.dangerCancelSub: Permanently terminate this hosting plan for {{domain}}.
acct.warn1: Your cPanel account and all files will be permanently deleted
acct.warn2: All email accounts, databases, and FTP accounts will be removed
acct.warn3: All addon domains attached to this plan will be unlinked
acct.warn4: Anti-Red protection and Cloudflare DNS records will be cleaned up
acct.warn5: This cannot be undone and no refund will be issued
acct.warn6: The domain itself remains registered to you — only the hosting is cancelled
acct.confirmPrompt: To confirm, type CANCEL in the box below. The button stays disabled until the phrase matches exactly.

site.descMaintenance: Visitors see a "We'll be back soon" page. Email, FTP, and databases still work.
site.descSuspended: HTTP, FTP, email, and databases are all paused. Visitors see the standard "Account Suspended" notice.
site.headsUp: Heads up: Taking your site offline does not pause your expiry countdown or auto-renewal billing. The plan keeps ticking like normal — this is a visibility toggle only.
site.modeMaintenanceDesc: Recommended. Visitors see a clean "We'll be back soon" page. Email, FTP, and databases keep working.
site.modeSuspendDesc: Stops HTTP, FTP, email, and databases. Visitors see the standard cPanel "Account Suspended" page.
site.confirmMaintenance: You're about to enable Maintenance Mode on {{domain}}. Visitors will see a "We'll be back soon" page. Email, FTP, and databases will keep working.
site.confirmSuspend: You're about to fully suspend {{domain}}. HTTP, FTP, email, and databases will all stop. Visitors will see cPanel's "Account Suspended" page.
site.reminderBilling: Reminder: billing keeps running. Your expiry date stays the same and auto-renewal will still trigger if enabled.
site.bringOnlineConfirm: Bring {{domain}} back online? Public access resumes immediately. Allow up to 1 minute for caching/CDN to fully clear.

email.title: Email Manager
email.deleteConfirm: Delete {{address}}? All messages will be lost.

security.title: Security
security.captchaUnavailable: Visitor Captcha is available on the Gold plan only.

banner.detected: We noticed your browser is in {{lang}}
banner.tagline: Keep this language for the panel?

errors.cpanelDown: Hosting service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes — your data is safe.
errors.cpanelSlow: Your hosting server is responding slowly right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.cpanelUnreachable: Can't reach your hosting server right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.uploadSlow: Still working — your hosting server is responding slowly. Large files or slow mobile networks can take longer. Please don't close this tab.
